headline: Jim Cramer Discusses Johnson Controls As Some Data Center Peers Slump
summary: Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE:JCI) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer highlighted the stock as a data center play. He commented: Then we spring back to the data center again, this time with Johnson Controls, heating, ventilation, air conditioning. A lot of […]
